mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM NOTICE n LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC u ON n.INSERT_USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND notice_type = #{noticeType}
AND notice_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND NOTICE_CONTENTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( notice_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NOTICE_CONTENTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND notice_type NOT IN
#{item}
AND NOW() BETWEEN n.START_DATE AND n.END_DATE
AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(n.START_DATE, ' ', n.START_TIME), '%Y%m%d %H%i') <= NOW() AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(n.END_DATE, ' ', n.END_TIME), '%Y%m%d %H%i') >= NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE ( NOTICE_TYPE, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENTS, START_DATE, START_TIME, END_DATE, END_TIME, INSERT_USER_ID, UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{noticeType}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContents}, #{startDate}, #{startTime}, #{endDate}, #{endTime}, #{insertUserId}, #{updateUserId} )
